name: Kove | Clan Wars
description: The dense forest envelops the land, its ancient oaks standing tall amidst winding rivers and serene lakes. Abandoned structures, remnants of forgotten times, add a mysterious air to the surroundings. Here, clans perpetually navigate a delicate balance of alliances and rivalries. Skirmishes erupt sporadically, echoing through the trees, sometimes escalating into full-scale wars that resonate with the clash of magic and the cries of warriors. Amidst the tumult, personal dramas unfold—feuds ignite between clan members, fueled by pride and ambition, weaving a tapestry of conflict and intrigue in this wild, untamed realm
creator: NextDoorGuy
